title: Blooming Wisteria
body:
# Blooming Wisteria **Hi!** This pack replaces all Azaleas with purple Wisterias!
Purple flowers go great with white and light builds and will unlock new color palettes for your designs! I also changed the names of all included blocks.
**Hope you like it!**
